title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 307.270 - State employees retirement system may agree with commission on coverage of employees
text:
307.270.  State employees retirement system may agree with commission on coverage of employees. — The Missouri state employees retirement system may make an agreement with the vehicle equipment safety commission for the coverage of said commission's employees pursuant to article III(f) of the compact.  Any such agreement, as nearly as may be, shall provide for arrangements similar to those available to the employees of this state and shall be subject to amendment or termination in accordance with its terms.
(L. 1965 p. 495 § 5)
